case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEISS, MONIKA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 22 VANDEWATER STREET, #105 & 22 VANDEWATER STREET, PARKING STALL #6, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WEISS, MONIKA
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1 TO BE WEISS, MONIKA
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT WEISS, MONIKA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $36.66 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WEISS, MONIKA
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
ORDER RE: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT
